label: 3914 Materials development and methods research for mathematics, science, and engineering

children.heading: Authorization to award competitive grants; covered institutions, businesses, etc.; purposes
children.label: a Authorization to award competitive grants; covered institutions, businesses, etc.; purposes

children.text: for instructional curriculum improvement and faculty development in mathematics, science, and engineering;
for programs designed to enhance public understanding of mathematics, science, and engineering, including the use of public broadcasting entities; and
for research on methods of instruction and educational programs in mathematics, science, engineering, and critical foreign languages.
teaching and learning research and its application to local and private sector instructional materials development and to improved teacher training programs;
research on the use of local and informal science education activities;
research on recruitment, retention, and improvement of mathematics, science, engineering, and critical languages faculties; and
analysis of materials and methods for mathematics, science, and engineering education used in other countries and their potential application in the United States.

children.heading: Matching grant requirements
children.label: c Matching grant requirements
children.text: Funds awarded for such competitive grants shall be expended through a system requiring matching of the grant. The minimum amount required as a match shall be equal to a percentage of the grant that is determined by the Foundation. Funds made available for matching purposes may include in-kind services or other resources.

children.heading: Materials or methods research application requirements
children.label: d Materials or methods research application requirements
children.text: In making grant applications for materials or methods research for the purposes described in subsections (a)(1) and (a)(3), the Foundation shall assure the involvement of appropriate State or local education agencies in the case of applications submitted by other entities described in subsection (a), or that one or more of such other entities will be consulted in the case of applications submitted by State or local education agencies.
